items.line_en: I'm not feeling very well. I've got a terrible stomachache and I keep throwing up.

coach.say: I'm not feeling very well. I've got a terrible stomachache and I keep throwing up.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm not feeling very well. / I've got a terrible stomachache and I keep throwing up.

items.line_en: Have you had any diarrhea? No, I haven't. How long have you been feeling like this?

coach.say: Have you had any diarrhea? No, I haven't. How long have you been feeling like this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you had any diarrhea? / No, / I haven't. / How long have you been feeling like this?

items.line_en: It's late last night. Do you know if you're allergic to anything? No, not that I know of.

coach.say: It's late last night. Do you know if you're allergic to anything? No, not that I know of.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's late last night. / Do you know if you're allergic to anything? / No, / not that I know of.

items.line_en: What have you eaten recently? Well, my two children cooked dinner for my wife and me last night.

coach.say: What have you eaten recently? Well, my two children cooked dinner for my wife and me last night.
coach.hint: Chunk it: What have you eaten recently? / Well, / my two children cooked dinner for my wife and me last night.

items.line_en: It was that waiting anniversary you see and they wanted to surprise us. That was a nice thought. What did you have?

coach.say: It was that waiting anniversary you see and they wanted to surprise us. That was a nice thought. What did you have?
coach.hint: Chunk it: It was that waiting anniversary you see and they wanted to surprise us. / That was a nice thought. / What did you have?

items.line_en: Well, I'm not sure what it was actually. Some sort of a seafood and pasta dish.

coach.say: Well, I'm not sure what it was actually. Some sort of a seafood and pasta dish.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / I'm not sure what it was actually. / Some sort of a seafood and pasta dish.

items.line_en: They spent a long time cooking it so, you know, I felt I had to eat it.

coach.say: They spent a long time cooking it so, you know, I felt I had to eat it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: They spent a long time cooking it so, / you know, / I felt I had to eat it.

items.line_en: It wasn't very nice to be honest. My wife hardly ate any so I ate hers too.

coach.say: It wasn't very nice to be honest. My wife hardly ate any so I ate hers too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It wasn't very nice to be honest. / My wife hardly ate any so I ate hers too.

items.line_en: Okay, I think you've got food poisoning.

coach.say: Okay, I think you've got food poisoning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / I think you've got food poisoning.

items.line_en: The best thing to do is to rest and don't eat anything for the next 24 hours.

coach.say: The best thing to do is to rest and don't eat anything for the next 24 hours.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The best thing to do is to rest and / don't eat anything for the next 24 hours.

items.line_en: After that, you can eat things like bread or rice, but no milk or cheese.

coach.say: After that, you can eat things like bread or rice, but no milk or cheese.
coach.hint: Chunk it: After that, / you can eat things like bread or rice, / but no milk or cheese.

items.line_en: Right. And drink lots of water or black tea with a little sugar in.

coach.say: Right. And drink lots of water or black tea with a little sugar in.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Right. / And drink lots of water or black tea with a little sugar in.

items.line_en: Okay. Do I need to make another appointment? No, I'm sure you'll be fine.

coach.say: Okay. Do I need to make another appointment? No, I'm sure you'll be fine.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay. / Do I need to make another appointment? / No, / I'm sure you'll be fine.

items.line_en: But come back if you're not feeling better in two days. Thanks a lot.

coach.say: But come back if you're not feeling better in two days. Thanks a lot.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But come back if you're not feeling better in two days. / Thanks a lot.

items.line_en: And maybe tell your children that you want to go to a restaurant next year. Yes, I will. Goodbye.

coach.say: And maybe tell your children that you want to go to a restaurant next year. Yes, I will. Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And maybe tell your children that you want to go to a restaurant next year. / Yes, / I will. / Goodbye.

items.line_en: Goodbye.

coach.say: Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Goodbye.

items.line_en: Hello, Mr. Green. Please sit down.

coach.say: Hello, Mr. Green. Please sit down.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / Mr. / Green. / Please sit down.

items.line_en: Thanks.

coach.say: Thanks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks.

items.line_en: What seems to be the problem?

coach.say: What seems to be the problem?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What seems to be the problem?

items.line_en: Well, I haven't been feeling very well recently. My chest hurts and I keep getting really bad headaches.

coach.say: Well, I haven't been feeling very well recently. My chest hurts and I keep getting really bad headaches.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Well, / I haven't been feeling very well recently. / My chest hurts and I keep getting really bad headaches.

items.line_en: Have you been taking anything for them? Yes, paracetyl, but it didn't really help much.

coach.say: Have you been taking anything for them? Yes, paracetyl, but it didn't really help much.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you been taking anything for them? / Yes, / paracetyl, / but it didn't really help much.

items.line_en: Have you got any other symptoms? Yes.

coach.say: Have you got any other symptoms? Yes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Have you got any other symptoms? / Yes.

items.line_en: I can't stop sneezing.

coach.say: I can't stop sneezing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I can't stop sneezing.

items.line_en: Yes, I can see that.

coach.say: Yes, I can see that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / I can see that.

items.line_en: And how long have you been feeling like this?

coach.say: And how long have you been feeling like this?
coach.hint: Chunk it: And how long have you been feeling like this?

items.line_en: Oh, let me see.

coach.say: Oh, let me see.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / let me see.

items.line_en: It's three days now.

coach.say: It's three days now.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's three days now.

items.line_en: Right. Let me have a look at you. Say R.

coach.say: Right. Let me have a look at you. Say R.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Right. / Let me have a look at you. / Say R.

items.line_en: That's fine, thanks.

coach.say: That's fine, thanks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's fine, / thanks.

items.line_en: I'm just going to take a temperature.

coach.say: I'm just going to take a temperature.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm just going to take a temperature.

items.line_en: Yes, got a bit of a temperature.

coach.say: Yes, got a bit of a temperature.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / got a bit of a temperature.

items.line_en: But nothing serious. I think you've got a virus.

coach.say: But nothing serious. I think you've got a virus.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But nothing serious. / I think you've got a virus.

items.line_en: You need to stay in bed and rest for two or three days.

coach.say: You need to stay in bed and rest for two or three days.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You need to stay in bed and rest for two or / three days.

items.line_en: Do I need a...

coach.say: Do I need a...
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do I need a...

items.line_en: Oh.

coach.say: Oh.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh.

items.line_en: Let's see.

coach.say: Let's see.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let's see.

items.line_en: Thanks.

coach.say: Thanks.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks.

items.line_en: Do I need some antibiotics?

coach.say: Do I need some antibiotics?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do I need some antibiotics?

items.line_en: I'm allergic to penicillin, by the way.

coach.say: I'm allergic to penicillin, by the way.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm allergic to penicillin, / by the way.

items.line_en: No antibiotics don't work with viruses.

coach.say: No antibiotics don't work with viruses.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No antibiotics don't work with viruses.

items.line_en: But I'm going to give you something stronger for the headaches.

coach.say: But I'm going to give you something stronger for the headaches.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But I'm going to give you something stronger for the headaches.

items.line_en: Oh, right.

coach.say: Oh, right.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / right.

items.line_en: Here's a prescription for some painkillers.

coach.say: Here's a prescription for some painkillers.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Here's a prescription for some painkillers.

items.line_en: Thanks a lot. How often should I take them?

coach.say: Thanks a lot. How often should I take them?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thanks a lot. / How often should I take them?

items.line_en: Every four hours.

coach.say: Every four hours.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Every four hours.

items.line_en: If you're not better in three days, then come back and we'll do some blood tests.

coach.say: If you're not better in three days, then come back and we'll do some blood tests.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you're not better in three days, / then come back and we'll do some blood tests.

items.line_en: Thank you, doctor.

coach.say: Thank you, doctor.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / doctor.

items.line_en: Not at all.

coach.say: Not at all.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Not at all.

items.line_en: Goodbye.

coach.say: Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Goodbye.

items.line_en: Bye.

coach.say: Bye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Bye.

items.line_en: Right. Who's the next patient?

coach.say: Right. Who's the next patient?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Right. / Who's the next patient?

items.line_en: Oh, no.

coach.say: Oh, no.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh, / no.
